name: Kabayan Hotel
detail: Thank you, Kabayan Hotel, for a wonderful experience!

name: St Giles Makati – A St Giles Hotel, Manila
detail: Apart from the rather sluggish wifi connection, the hotel exceeded all my expectations. The room was great, breakfast spread was filling with great variety, and the staff (especially housekeeping and front desk) were prompt, attentive and quick to serve. I have stayed at several different hotels in Manila and would highly recommend St Giles. It's also a stone's throw away from the night life. But if you have guests who drive, then be prepared for a rather narrow, small and very limited car park.

name: Townhouse College Residences in University Belt, Metro Manila
detail: The room was clean and the air-conditioner was working well.

name: Red Planet Manila Bay
detail: Reception staff extremely rude, discrimating against Western foreigners, unhelpful and unprofessional. Where every hotel I have ever stayed in will accept an official government issued British driving licence as the required identification this hotel insisted on a passport only - which I never carry due to the risks of losing it when moving around the country. Because if this they basically kicked me out in a very embarrassing manner. I had a local colleague coming too - but they didn’t need to see any ID from him! Therefore they are discrimination against foreigners. I should add that the hotel had also been paid in advance so not sure what they were concerned about apart from ticking a box to say foreigner passport copied - a worrying practice also! Agoda only refunded my payment but I still had to find another hotel at very short notice in heavy rain. - my extra time and expenses were not covered. This hotel is far too clinical and plastic. Avoid at all costs.

name: Savoy Hotel Manila near Airport NAIA Terminal 3 MNL
detail: Stayed in this hotel for three times already, and I will definitely come back again . The location is good, just across NAIA terminal 3 (they provide a free shuttle bus every hour from the airport to the hotel. You can find the buses at the arrival gate at the ground floor of the airport). There are some restaurants around the area, spa, nail salons, dental clinic, pharmacy store, laundry shop , walking distance to resorts world wherein there’s also a small shopping mall, there is a near supermarket as well. The breakfast buffet is good, and you won’t get sick of the options because everyday they change the choices. The staffs were also amazing! I left my watch in the room during my first stay and they notified me and gave it back. On my third stay, I asked my mom to wait for me at the hotel since I’ll only arrive in the Philippines after a very long flight and they assisted my mom and allowed her to check-in early while waiting for me to land in Manila. Every time I go back to Manila, I choose this hotel and I highly recommend it.

name: Red Planet BGC The Fort
detail: Overall, Red Planet exceeded my expectations.
area: Bonifacio Global City (BGC) / Taguig,Manila - View on map

name: Belmont Hotel Manila near NAIA Terminal 3 MNL
detail: This is one of the pricier hotels in Manila as it's near the international airport. My favorite thing about our stay in the hotel was the rooftop view from the top floor of the hotel where the pool was also located. You can lounge there while enjoying the view. They also have a sauna and a gym. The staff was also very helpful. They immediately helped me when I got locked out of my room because the automatic doorknob needed a change in battery. The food at the restaurant was delectable. There's a Starbucks on the same building of the hotel and there are a couple other restaurants around the Resorts World area which are easily accessible from the hotel. This hotel accommodated our last minute booking because our supposed first booking at another hotel also got cancelled last minute. Anyway, this hotel turned out to be better than we've expected and it's a great value for your money.

name: Hop Inn Hotel Ermita Manila
detail: This a very new hotel in Manila, perfect for solo or double traveler/s. The room is clean, i love the bed, the pillows are thick and the comforter is like what you found in a 5star hotel. Very comfy! The aircon is big, quiet and ofcourse new! So its very cold. The toilet is quite big, very clean with hot shower and dryer. I like the view from the window, I suggest you to get the ocean view for a great sunset. Its very relaxing. The staff are very courteous. If you want to go to the mall, robinsons manila is 5-10mins walk, or you can take a taxi if you dont feel like walking. Mall of asia is 15-20mins away by taxi. If you have time to get around, theres a lot of good restaurants and bars around the area. The downsides are they only have one chair in the room, they dont offer room service and they dont have restos (as of now, I dont know if theyre planning to have soon), sad to say. If you want to eat and you dont want to go far, there is a conveniet store beside the lobby.

name: Go Hotels Ermita
detail: Very clean and modern hotel. I stayed at this hotel because it had a 24 hour reception which I required as my flight into Manila arrived at 2 am. I could not find anything to fault at this hotel considering the price. The location is a short walk to Manila Bay, not that I saw much to view there. Also very close to the massive Robinson’s Place mall if you’re into shopping. The staff allowed me to check out at 12pm, and also stored my baggage for an additional hour as I had some time to kill before continuing my travels.

name: Bayview Park Hotel
detail: this hotel gives very good value to its customers .the rooms are very clean and comfortable, and the service is very prompt if you find anything not quite right. the staff are very friendly and helpful , you only have to ask , and it is attended to right away .i have stayed there many times , and i would highly recommend staying there to anyone . there are good and bad hotels in manila, but book this one and you will not have any regrets . take it from a fussy Englishman. i travel all over the world , and this hotel gives very good value . i am more than happy to stay there whenever i go to manila . just one thing though , don't use the hotel taxi , it's expensive .
